instruction:
For the graph of the equation $y=\sqrt{x+10}$, answer the following questions: The $x$-intercepts have $x=$ [ANS]
Note: If there is more than one answer enter them separated by commas. If there are none, enter none. The $y$-intercepts have $y=$ [ANS]
Note: If there is more than one answer enter them separated by commas. If there are none, enter none. Is the graph symmetric with respect to the $x$-axis? Input yes or no here: [ANS]
Is the graph symmetric with respect to the $y$-axis? Input yes or no here: [ANS]
Is the graph symmetric with respect to the origin? Input yes or no here: [ANS]
